name: Zscaler, Inc.
business: Zscaler sells a cloud-native Zero Trust security platform (Zscaler Zero Trust Exchange) that securely connects users, devices, and applications without relying on traditional perimeter security. Its platform includes solutions for Zero Trust Everywhere, Data Security Everywhere, Security for AI, and Agentic Operations. As of July 31, 2025, it had over 9,400 customers, including approximately 40% of the Forbes Global 2000 and over 45% of the Fortune 500.

exposures.sentence: We pioneered a cloud platform, the Zscaler Zero Trust Exchange TM platform, which represented a fundamental shift in the architectural design and approach to networking and security that allows companies to securely accelerate their digital transformation initiatives.
Security for AI allows organizations to securely embrace public and private AI applications.

Data Security Everywhere is Zscaler s approach to safeguarding sensitive information across its entire lifecycle, from creation to storage, transmission and access, regardless of location, device or application.

If our global network of data centers, which deliver our services, was damaged or otherwise failed to meet the requirements of our business, our ability to provide services to our customers and maintain the performance of our cloud platform could be negatively impacted, which could cause our business to suffer.
